_meta.data_classification: internal replay QA fixture / benchmark observation data
_meta.equity_source: yfinance get_earnings_dates (keyless EPS estimate vs reported)
_meta.note: Macro entries are curated FOMC observations; equity entries are real keyless EPS surprises. Not an external real-time consensus feed.
_meta.production_boundary: This file is not an external real-time consensus feed and must not be marketed or surfaced as a true consensus provider.
_meta.runtime_fallback: In production/live paths, when structured actual/expected/surprise_std/source is unavailable, V6 must show proxy_surprise or fall back to headline/classifier logic.
_meta.source: internal replay QA expected-change fixtures paired with public FOMC decisions; not a live provider
